title: Curriculum Developer Vacancy at Resonance International Enterprises - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Curriculum Developer Vacancy at Resonance International Enterprises - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Resonance International Enterprises. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Curriculum Developer to strengthen our Gurgaon-based team.

About Resonance International Enterprises:
Resonance International Enterprises is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Contribute to school newsletter, blogs, and other publications
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Utilize technology and digital tools to enhance learning outcomes
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback
• Coordinate with academic counselors for student career guidance

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Educational Technology
• Proficiency in Classroom Management
• Proficiency in Child Psychology
• Proficiency in Pedagogy
• Proficiency in LMS Platforms
• Proficiency in CBSE/ICSE Standards
• Proficiency in E-learning
• Proficiency in Content Creation

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Life and accident insurance
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Gurgaon, Haryana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Resonance International Enterprises!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
